features: Freshen up Carpets: Using Shake & Fresh is the ultimate solution for maintaining a clean and inviting home environment
Neutralises Odours: Say goodbye to stale odours, lingering pet smells and musty scents that can accumulate in your carpets over time
Multipack: This pack of 3 allows you to clean for longer! 3 of our bottles means you can keep stocked up and always ready to clean
Easy to Use: Shake over your carpet, wait a few minutes then vacuum to remove carpet odours
Refreshing Scent: Revitalise your carpets with this citrus scent of lemon
description: Product Description Here at Astonish we are proud of our products. Whatever your cleaning problem we aim to have a helpful cleaning solution, even when it comes to personal care. Now we’re not saying that we can work miracles, let’s be realistic cleaning can on occasions be hard work, but we’ve taken the time to ensure we’ve developed products that get the job done right, nothing less. Freshen up your carpets with the Shake & Fresh. Over time stale odours, lingering pet smells and musty scents can accumulate in your carpets. Combat these odours with Shake & Fresh and its Malodour Control Technology, leaving your carpets fresh with a citrus fragrance. Our easy-to-use format requires little effort, simply shake, wait a few minutes, and vacuum away – that’s cleaning made easy. Ingredients Dolomite, Calcium Carbonate, Fragrance, Silicon Dioxide Directions Open the flip cap and hold the bottle in a horizontal position. Gently shake from side to side over the carpeted area to slowly dispense the product. Apply as a thin even layer across the carpet. Wait a few minutes and then vacuum. For use only on dry carpets. Unsuitable for use on hard surfaces, carpet tiles or similar pile carpets and loop pile carpets. Store in a cool dark place with lid closure in place. See more
